title: Label non-compliant: missing age statement on young whisky (crop-occlusion, level 6, upside-down)
image_prompt: Photorealistic glass bottle with a classic vintage label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'River Run', 'Straight Bourbon Whiskey', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by River Run Distilling, Frankfort, KY'. (Note: strictly no age statement included). Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
expectedSourceBehavior: FAIL compliance (Missing age statement for whisky under 4 years)
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has moderate cropping or partial occlusion. Camera orientation is upside-down (180 degrees). The photo is upside down and needs rotation before automated approval.
